title: Mr J Soul v Mental Health Care UK Ltd: 1600857/2024
text:
Case No: 1600857/2024  
 
  
  
EMPLOYMENT TRIBUNALS  
  
  
Claimant:    Mr J Soul  
  
  
Respondent:  Mental Health Care UK Limited  
     
Heard at:  Cardiff (CVP)            On: 6 August 2024  
  
Before:   Employment Judge Brace   
  
REPRESENTATION:  
  
Claimant:  Did not attend  
Respondent:  Mr C Crow (Counsel)  
 
JUDGMENT   
  
The proceedings are dismissed following a withdrawal of the claim by the Claimant.   
  
The application made by the Respondent for a wasted costs order against the 
Claimant personally, pursuant to rule 80(3) Employment Tribunal Rules of 
Procedure 2013, is dismissed.  
 
 
          Employment Judge Brace  
          6 August 2024  
  
          JUDGMENT SENT TO THE PARTIES ON  
          6 August 2024  
  
          S Griffiths    
         FOR THE TRIBUNAL 
Note  
Reasons for the judgment were given orally at the hearing. Written reasons will not be provided 
unless a party asked for them at the hearing or a party makes a written request within 14 days of 
the sending of this written record of the decision.  
 
Public access to employment tribunal decisions  
Judgments (apart from judgments under rule 52) and reasons for the judgments are published, in 
full, online at www.gov.uk/employment-tribunal-decisions shortly after a copy has been sent to the 
claimant(s) and respondent(s) in a case.
